meta.name: Active Fuel
meta.description: A high-energy, performance-focused sports nutrition and activewear store. The design uses bold typography, high-contrast promotional banners, and a dense, functional layout optimized for quick shopping and conveying value offers.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, Times New Roman, Times, serif

header.notes: Complex multi-tier header. Top tier has logo left, primary nav center, search/account/cart right. Search is an input field with an inner button. Below is a secondary navigation bar with categories. Below that are multiple full-width announcement/promo bars with varied backgrounds.

footer.description: A complex footer split into a newsletter signup block on the left (lighter grey bg) and a large multi-column link area on the right (dark teal bg). Below is a lighter grey area for legal text and payment methods.
footer.notes: Footer features a distinctive split layout. Left side has a prominent newsletter sign-up box. Right side has 4 columns of links. Social icons are located below the newsletter. The very bottom section has legal text and payment logos.

productCard.notes: Cards have a very light grey/off-white background for the image area. Strong emphasis on pricing with 'Was/Now' styling and 'Save X' badges. Reviews are prominently displayed. The Add to Cart button ('Quick Buy') is a distinct dark teal pill-shaped button.

productGrid.notes: Standard grid layout. Cards have consistent heights. Very uniform and structured.

featuredProducts.heading: What's New
featuredProducts.notes: Uses large promotional image cards rather than standard product cards for this specific section, linking to categories or collections rather than individual items.

sections.name: announcement-bars

design.background: Multiple solid colors (white, teal) with text and icons.
design.text: Contrasting text colors depending on background (dark on light, light on dark). Small font sizes.
design.styling: No borders, tight padding, horizontal layout with flexbox for content distribution.

content.body: Multiple promotional messages, shipping details, and a countdown timer.
content.specialElements: Countdown timer visually distinct in small boxes.

sections.notes: Very dense informational area at the top of the page designed to drive urgency.

sections.name: hero-banner
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay on left side

design.text: Large, bold white display typography with drop shadow for legibility.
design.styling: Overlay text is left-aligned. Call to action button is prominent.

content.headline: Massive discount promotion with secondary code offer
content.cta: Single solid orange button, square or slightly rounded corners, bold white text.

media.description: Active person running outdoors in desert landscape, dynamic angle.

sections.notes: Highly promotional hero section focused entirely on a major sale event.

sections.name: promotional-banners
sections.layout: Full width image banner followed by horizontal row of pills

design.background: Image banner followed by white background for pills.
design.text: White text on banner, white text on dark pills.
design.styling: Banner is full width. Pills are uniformly spaced in a row.

content.cta: Multiple dark teal pill-shaped buttons serving as category quick-links.
content.specialElements: Floating pop-up offer on the bottom left of the banner.

sections.notes: Secondary promotional area leading directly into category navigation.

design.text: Bold white text overlaid on images, dark text for headers.
design.styling: Large image cards with dark overlays at bottom for text readability. Outline pill buttons below each card.

content.headline: What's New
content.cta: Outline pill-shaped buttons with dark text, one under each image card.

media.description: High-quality product and lifestyle photography for specific product lines.

content.specialElements: Small 'NEW IN' badges on top of some images.

sections.name: product-tabs-bestsellers
sections.layout: Tabs for category selection above a 4-column product grid.

design.text: Dark text. Tab text is styled distinctly to show active/inactive state.
design.styling: Product cards have very light backgrounds, prominent pricing with red 'Was' price and green 'Save' badge. Dark teal 'Quick Buy' pill buttons.

content.headline: Best Sellers / Trending This Week (Tabs)
content.cta: Dark teal solid pill buttons with icon and text 'Quick Buy' on every card. 'View All' outline pill button below the grid.

media.description: Clear product packaging shots on very light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Review stars, pricing badges, 'Quick Buy' buttons. Promotional text under the 'Quick Buy' button on each card.

sections.notes: High density of information on product cards (reviews, current price, old price, savings, secondary promo offer).

sections.name: clothing-sale

design.styling: Similar to bestsellers, but for apparel. Features color swatches below images.

content.headline: Clothing Sale
content.cta: Dark teal solid pill buttons with icon and text 'Quick Buy' on every card. 'View All' outline pill button below the grid.

media.description: Apparel modeled on people, light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Color swatch selectors below product images. Heart icon for favorites in top right of images.

sections.notes: Apparel specific product grid featuring swatches.
